name: run_scvelo_velocity
description: Run scVelo (RNA velocity; Bergen et al., Nature Biotechnology 2020) on a single-cell AnnData and return a velocity-derived pseudotime ordering of cells plus a per-cell velocity confidence. The input .h5ad MUST contain `spliced` and `unspliced` count layers (e.g. from velocyto, kb-python / kallisto|bustools, or STARsolo); without them RNA velocity cannot be estimated and the tool returns an error. Pipeline: filter_and_normalize -> moments -> velocity -> velocity_graph -> velocity_pseudotime + velocity_confidence. When a cluster_key is supplied, also returns the mean pseudotime per cluster (a coarse trajectory ordering).

adata_path.description: Server-accessible path or URL to an .h5ad AnnData that contains `spliced` and `unspliced` layers.

cluster_key.description: obs column to summarize pseudotime by (optional); returns mean velocity_pseudotime per cluster as a coarse ordering.

mean_pseudotime.description: Mean velocity_pseudotime across cells (0-1 ordering along inferred differentiation).

mean_confidence.description: Mean velocity_confidence across cells (0-1; local coherence of the velocity field).

pseudotime_by_cluster.description: Mean velocity_pseudotime per cluster (returned when cluster_key given), sorted early -> late.

pseudotime.description: Per-cell pseudotime (only for small datasets, n_cells <= 500).

confidence.description: Per-cell confidence (only for small datasets, n_cells <= 500).

error.description: Error description if the run failed (e.g. missing spliced/unspliced layers).
